title: pinus montezumae subsp. hartwegii
intro: Pinus montezumae subsp. hartwegii, also known as Hartweg's Monterey pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pinus montezumae subsp. hartwegii include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of this plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
